name: pr-body-markdown
description: Codex skill for drafting polished, reviewer-friendly pull request bodies.

interface.shortDescription: Draft or revise polished PR bodies with a clean Markdown structure.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill that favors concise summaries, grouped implementation details, and a clear test plan for reviewer-friendly PR bodies.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me draft or revise a polished pull request body with a concise summary, grouped details, and a clear test plan.
